title: bridge-matrix: MatrixClient error body uncapped
description: MatrixClient::send_text error path (matrix.rs:89) calls resp.text().await with no body size cap. A homeserver returning a very large error body (e.g., a WAF returning an HTML page) buffers the whole thing. Same pattern as nie-kef6.104 (SlackClient) and nie-y9mn.3 (TeamsClient). Should read at most 64 KiB before truncating, as bridge-jmap does.
